overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a dimly lit wooden cabin interior. The character uses a flashlight to investigate a bathroom and recreational room, interacting with the environment and an NPC before proceeding down a hallway to a bedroom.

events.description: flashlight beam moves across the bathroom sink and mirror
character turns from sink area toward the bathroom door

agents.ego_description: examining bathroom fixtures with flashlight, moving from sink to toilet area

entered.detail: white porcelain sink with silver faucet and soap dispenser
mirrored medicine cabinet mounted above the sink
white porcelain toilet with green lid and tank
green fabric shower curtain hanging from rod
black and white checkered tile flooring

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit wooden-paneled bathroom where the FBI agent uses a flashlight to examine the sink, mirror, and toilet area. The space is narrow with vintage fixtures and checkered tile flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition from bathroom to recreational room

events.description: character opens bathroom door revealing the main room beyond
ambient daylight from window becomes visible as character enters main room

agents.ego_description: opening bathroom door and stepping into the larger recreational room

notable_agents.action: man sitting on leather couch holding a small object

entered.detail: interior wooden door with brass doorknob
green felt pool table with wooden frame and pockets
brown leather sofa against the wall
window with blinds and curtains letting in daylight

segments.scene_description: The character opens the bathroom door and steps through into a larger recreational room. A pool table becomes visible on the left, and a man can be seen sitting on a leather couch in the distance near a window.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden-paneled recreational room with pool table and kitchenette

events.description: character turns left to walk around the pool table
flashlight illuminates fire-damaged fireplace area revealing soot marks
character turns back toward the seated man

agents.ego_description: circling the room to examine the pool table, television, kitchen area, and fireplace

notable_agents.action: man remains seated on couch near water cooler

entered.detail: old CRT television set on wooden stand
kitchen counter with coffee maker and various supplies
fireplace with visible soot and fire damage on surrounding wood
round wooden dining table with chairs
blue water cooler dispenser with bottle

segments.scene_description: The character explores the spacious recreational room, circling past the pool table to examine a CRT television, kitchen counter, and a fire-damaged fireplace. The flashlight reveals soot marks on the wooden walls near the fireplace before the character turns back toward the seated man.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway with green carpet leading to bedrooms

events.description: character approaches and engages in conversation with the seated man
character exits main room into narrow hallway with dartboard
character opens door and enters bedroom with bed and dresser

agents.ego_description: engaging in conversation with the seated man, then proceeding down the hallway to investigate the bedroom

notable_agents.action: man sitting on couch turning to face the protagonist during conversation

entered.detail: long corridor with wooden panel walls and green carpet
closed wooden door at end of hallway
small bedroom with bed, dresser, and cardboard boxes

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the seated man for a conversation, then turns and walks through a doorway into a narrow hallway with green carpet. The character proceeds down the hall, passing a dartboard, and enters a small bedroom containing a bed and dresser.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a vintage bathroom into the expansive, lived-in spaces of a wooden cabin. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit bathroom where a flashlight illuminates checkered tiles and old fixtures before the camera pushes through a door into a larger recreational room. As the space opens up, the camera glides past a pool table and a CRT television toward a fire-damaged fireplace, revealing soot-stained walls before turning back toward a man seated on a leather couch. The scene then shifts from the open room into a narrow, green-carpeted hallway, passing a dartboard as the camera proceeds forward. Finally, the movement concludes as the character enters a small, quiet bedroom containing a bed and a dresser.
